entries.title: Commentary on Ezekiel on ezekiel 46:8
entries.excerpt: (Verse 8) When the prince enters, he shall enter through the gateway vestibule and exit through the same way. That prince, of whom it was said above, 'And the prince will enter through the way of the outer gate, and through the same gate he will enter and exit' (John 10), has free will and the power to lay down his life and take it up again. And when he comes to us or ascends to the heavens, he exercises the same authority of his majesty. Finally, he does not seek markets, nor solemnities, nor does he observe any difference in days: because every time is a celebration for him.
